semantic_info.description: This dataset, from the healthcare domain, tracks illness trends through various influenza-like illness indicators, including weighted and unweighted ILI percentages across different age groups and the total number of reported cases. The dataset shows a strong trend as indicated by a high trend linearity (R2 = 0.78) and a notable trend slope, with minimal influence from seasonality (seasonality strength = 0.07). The presence of non-stationarity (ADF p-value = 0.7598) highlights potential challenges in forecasting due to shifts in distribution over time.
semantic_info.reasoning_for_recommendation: Given the strong trend and non-stationary nature of the dataset, normalization-based models and linear baselines are suitable to handle distribution shifts and extract meaningful insights over time.
